data.name: A Lose Hero in the Castle of the Succubi
data.detailed_description:
In this game, you will explore the Demon Castle by manipulating the characters in the pixel art.
Walk around the various parts of the Demon Castle and talk to Succubus.

~ Synopsis ~
A brave man who was captured by a succubus before his departure
It is a game to meet Succubus at Demon Castle.
The hero is cursed and cannot escape - no matter how hard he tries.
He is always carried by a succubus as he moves around the environment.

data.short_description: In this game, you will explore the Demon Castle by manipulating the characters in the pixel art. Walk around the various parts of the Demon Castle and talk to Succubus.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3GHz以上
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 10 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
